Makefile.am.reason: Automake build source migrated without semantic changes.

autogen.sh.reason: Autotools bootstrap entrypoint migrated without semantic changes.

build/apxs-wrapper.in.reason: APXS build wrapper template required by configure.ac.

build/ax_prog_apache.m4.reason: Apache detection macro required by configure.ac.

build/find_apxs.m4.reason: APXS detection macro required by configure.ac.

build/find_libmodsec.m4.reason: libmodsecurity detection macro required by configure.ac.

configure.ac.reason: Autoconf source migrated without runtime semantic changes; phase 12 changed AC_CONFIG_SRCDIR from LICENSE to src/mod_security3.c so attribution files can live outside the build source tree.

src/mod_security3.c.reason: Migrated Apache module entrypoint to adapter-owned source without semantic changes.

src/mod_security3.h.reason: Migrated Apache module header to adapter-owned source without semantic changes.

src/msc_config.c.reason: Migrated Apache connector configuration source without semantic changes.

src/msc_config.h.reason: Migrated Apache connector configuration header without semantic changes.

src/msc_filters.c.reason: Migrated Apache input/output filter source without semantic changes.

src/msc_filters.h.reason: Migrated Apache filter header without semantic changes.

src/msc_utils.c.reason: Migrated Apache connector utilities without semantic changes.

src/msc_utils.h.reason: Migrated Apache connector utility header without semantic changes.

t/conf/extra.conf.in.reason: Retained template path used by the upstream Autotools test layout.

AUTHORS.reason: Upstream attribution is durable repository metadata, not an Apache connector build input.

CHANGES.reason: Upstream change context is durable repository metadata, not an Apache connector build input.

LICENSE.reason: Apache-2.0 license text is retained centrally; configure.ac now anchors source validation on src/mod_security3.c.

README.md.base_path: repo-owned Apache source README before phase 12 cleanup
README.md.reason: Adapter source overview belongs in connector documentation, not the functional build source tree.

layout.phase13: Strict source layout: connector src/ contains only productive Apache C sources; build and metadata files live at connector root, while Autotools regression templates live under connectors/apache/tests and materialize back to their upstream-compatible paths.

connectors/apache/metadata.c.reason: Repo-owned adapter metadata helper; intentionally not materialized into the productive Apache connector build source.

connectors/apache/metadata.h.reason: Repo-owned adapter metadata declarations; intentionally not materialized into the productive Apache connector build source.

connectors/apache/SOURCE_MAP.json.reason: Repo-owned per-file provenance manifest; consumed by the materializer but not copied into connector-src.
